mano_cua.result_summary: 虚拟滚动页面ng-dropdown-panel背景透明，无边框无阴影，选项列表直接浮在页面上。对比data-sources页面下拉菜单有白色背景、边框和阴影，两者样式不一致。Virtual Scroll的ng-dropdown-panel缺少background-color/border/box-shadow样式。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Compared virtual-scroll page dropdown (transparent background, no border, no shadow) with data-sources page dropdown (white background, visible border, proper container styling). The virtual scroll ng-dropdown-panel is missing background-color CSS, confirmed as a style bug.
